required_preferences.fact: Prepares breakfast and all family members' morning routines the night before—including school bags, lunches, and review materials—to minimize morning chaos while managing the household alone

supersedes.fact: Prepares breakfast and review materials the night before 8am committee meetings, to minimize stress on early mornings

required_preferences.fact: Now uses a hybrid scheduling approach: maintains a handwritten planner for personal tasks, but relies on digital calendar tools for all course design, student coordination, and interdisciplinary project scheduling

supersedes.fact: Keeps a handwritten planner for all tasks—never relies on digital calendars for scheduling

required_preferences.fact: Watches classic European cinema on Friday nights—never streams blockbuster action movies
Prioritizes grouping her own household’s and her mother’s errands into a single outing whenever possible to reduce time away from work and minimize schedule strain
Prefers to co-host or swap teaching responsibilities with fellow faculty when covering unexpected classes taken over from withdrawn students—avoids solo emergency coverage when possible
Uses collaborative cloud documents for curriculum revisions—refuses to send edits via email attachments

persona: A tenured history professor at a major university
